summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new CRM features: Pipeline management, User list & role management, Admin menu platform settings, and Affiliate toggle & self-enrollment. Backend APIs working with 88.9% success rate. Frontend UI mostly functional with role permission limitations.

role_permission.issue: Super admin user has 'member' role in organization context, cannot update org settings
role_permission.impact: Cannot toggle affiliate program from super admin account
role_permission.error: 403 - Only owners/admins can update organization settings

design_issues.issue: Pipeline Stages editor not visible to users with 'member' role
design_issues.impact: Super admin cannot see/edit pipeline stages in organization settings
design_issues.note: This is by design - only owner/admin roles can edit pipeline stages

passed_tests: ✅ Feature 1: Pipeline Management - GET /api/organizations/settings returns deal_stages, task_stages, affiliate_enabled
✅ Feature 1: Pipeline Management - PUT /api/organizations/settings successfully updates deal_stages (added custom stage)
✅ Feature 2: User List - GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/members returns member list with roles
✅ Feature 2: Role Management - PUT /api/organizations/members/{user_id}/role successfully changes member roles
✅ Feature 4: Affiliate Self-Enrollment - POST /api/affiliate/enroll works when org has affiliate enabled
✅ Feature 4: Affiliate Status - GET /api/affiliate/me returns affiliate status and referral link
✅ Feature 4: Affiliate Unenroll - POST /api/affiliate/unenroll successfully removes affiliate status
✅ Frontend: Settings Profile tab shows Affiliate Program section with enrollment button
✅ Frontend: Settings Organization tab shows Team Members list with user details
✅ Frontend: Admin page displays 'upmuch Platform Settings' label and platform-specific settings
action_items: Consider granting super admin users 'owner' role in their organization context to access all organization settings
Verify if Pipeline Stages editor should be visible to super admin users regardless of org role

success_rate.frontend: 75% (3/4 features fully working, 1 with role limitations)

pipeline_management.frontend_ui: ⚠️ PARTIAL - visible only to owner/admin roles
pipeline_management.notes: Deal stages can be retrieved and updated via API. Frontend editor requires owner/admin role.

user_list_role_management.backend_api: ✅ GET /api/organizations/{org_id}/members and PUT role endpoints working
user_list_role_management.frontend_ui: ✅ Team Members section visible in Settings Organization tab
user_list_role_management.notes: Member list displays correctly with role management functionality.

admin_menu_platform_settings.backend_api: ✅ Admin endpoints accessible to super admin
admin_menu_platform_settings.frontend_ui: ✅ 'upmuch Platform Settings' label visible in Admin page Settings tab
admin_menu_platform_settings.notes: Platform settings clearly separated from organization settings.

affiliate_toggle_self_enrollment.backend_api: ⚠️ Affiliate APIs working, org settings toggle requires owner/admin role
affiliate_toggle_self_enrollment.frontend_ui: ✅ Affiliate Program section visible in Profile tab when enabled
affiliate_toggle_self_enrollment.notes: Self-enrollment works. Org-level affiliate toggle requires proper role permissions.

test_credentials.user_role_in_org: member (should be owner for full access)
